creator: niels=freebsd@bakker.net
text:
Port misc/ddate used to be based on util-linux-2.12r but three days ago
was updated to reference util-linux-2.12q.  In my alphabet, q precedes r.
At http://www.kernel.org/pub/linux/utils/util-linux/ 2.12q is dated Jan
2005, and 2.12r is dated Sep 2005 (and is the latest available version).

Fix: 

Previous version of the port should probably be reinstated.
How-To-Repeat: # pkg_version -v
ddate-2.12r                         >   succeeds port (port has 2.12q)
